user_message: Pulling in context from Northwind Traders's email thread -- need to identify the blockers for the deployment blockers.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-18 15:45 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Northwind Traders deployment blockers

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
Date: 2024-02-24 10:15 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Northwind Traders

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Date: 2024-01-14 15:51 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Northwind Traders: there's a dependency on the security team's review that could delay us

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF42-I trap (Skips whitespace context -- proposes redundant motion); produces complete Signal assessment, opportunity hypothesis with confidence, ownership routing, response draft, next-s
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF42-I failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF42-I failure mode (Skips whitespace context -- proposes redundant motion)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF42-I -- Skips whitespace context -- proposes redundant motion
